title: Backend Developer
description: Build robust servers, APIs, and database systems. Learn programming fundamentals, web frameworks, databases, authentication, caching, testing, and deployment for scalable backend systems.

nodes.title: Choose a Language
nodes.description: Pick a backend language — Node.js/JavaScript, Python, Go, Java, or C#. Each has strong ecosystems for backend development.

nodes.title: Language Fundamentals
nodes.description: Variables, types, control flow, functions, OOP, error handling, and standard library mastery for your chosen language.

nodes.title: Data Structures & Algorithms
nodes.description: Arrays, linked lists, stacks, queues, hash maps, trees, graphs, sorting, and searching algorithms.

nodes.title: Git & GitHub
nodes.description: Version control, branching strategies, pull requests, code reviews, and collaborative workflows.

nodes.title: Command Line Proficiency
nodes.description: Navigate the terminal, file operations, process management, environment variables, and shell scripting basics.

nodes.title: HTTP & Networking
nodes.description: HTTP methods, status codes, headers, request/response cycle, DNS, TCP/IP, and REST principles.

nodes.title: RESTful API Design
nodes.description: Design RESTful APIs — resource naming, proper HTTP methods, status codes, pagination, versioning, and HATEOAS.

nodes.title: Web Framework
nodes.description: Express.js, FastAPI, Django, Spring Boot, or Gin — learn routing, middleware, request handling, and error management.

nodes.title: Database Fundamentals
nodes.description: Relational vs NoSQL, ACID properties, normalization, indexing, and choosing the right database for your use case.

nodes.title: SQL Mastery
nodes.description: Complex queries, JOINs, subqueries, window functions, CTEs, indexes, query optimization, and stored procedures.

nodes.title: ORM & Database Drivers
nodes.description: Prisma, SQLAlchemy, TypeORM, or raw drivers — connecting your app to databases, migrations, and query building.

nodes.title: Authentication & Authorization
nodes.description: JWT, OAuth 2.0, session-based auth, password hashing (bcrypt), 2FA, and role-based access control.

nodes.title: Input Validation & Sanitization
nodes.description: Validate and sanitize all user input — prevent SQL injection, XSS, and other injection attacks.

nodes.title: Caching Strategies
nodes.description: Redis, Memcached, application-level caching, HTTP caching, cache invalidation patterns, and CDN caching.

nodes.title: Message Queues & Jobs
nodes.description: Background jobs, message queues (RabbitMQ, Kafka, Bull/BullMQ), event-driven architecture, and async processing.

nodes.title: WebSockets & Real-time
nodes.description: Real-time communication with WebSockets, Socket.io, Server-Sent Events, and pub/sub patterns.

nodes.title: File Handling & Storage
nodes.description: File uploads, streaming, image processing, cloud storage (S3), and CDN delivery for media files.

nodes.title: Email & Notifications
nodes.description: Transactional emails (SendGrid, SES), email templates, push notifications, and SMS integrations.

nodes.title: API Testing
nodes.description: Unit tests, integration tests, API endpoint testing with Jest/Pytest, and E2E API testing.

nodes.title: API Documentation
nodes.description: OpenAPI/Swagger specs, API documentation tools, and generating interactive API docs.

nodes.title: Logging & Monitoring
nodes.description: Structured logging, log levels, log aggregation (ELK stack), monitoring, and alerting for backend services.

nodes.title: Docker
nodes.description: Containerize your application — Dockerfile, Docker Compose, multi-stage builds, and container networking.

nodes.title: CI/CD Pipelines
nodes.description: Automated testing, building, and deployment with GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or Jenkins.

nodes.title: Deployment & Hosting
nodes.description: Deploy to AWS, GCP, Azure, Railway, Render, or Fly.io. Health checks, auto-scaling, and zero-downtime deployments.

nodes.title: Backend Security
nodes.description: OWASP Top 10, CORS, rate limiting, HTTPS/TLS, dependency scanning, and security best practices.

nodes.title: Microservices Architecture
nodes.description: Service decomposition, API gateways, service discovery, inter-service communication, and distributed systems basics.

nodes.title: GraphQL
nodes.description: GraphQL schema design, resolvers, queries, mutations, subscriptions, and Apollo Server.

nodes.title: API Performance
nodes.description: Query optimization, connection pooling, N+1 problem, database indexing, response caching, and load testing.

nodes.title: System Design Basics
nodes.description: Scalability, high availability, load balancing, database sharding, CAP theorem, and distributed systems concepts.
